name: @pokertools/e2e
description: End-to-end Docker integration tests for PokerTools API
author: A.Aurelius

scripts.pretest:docker: echo '🐳 Building Docker E2E dependencies...' && npm run build -w @pokertools/types && npm run build -w @pokertools/sdk && npm run contracts:build -w @pokertools/admin --if-present
